resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Linux PAYG meter D2as v5; 2 nodes x 730h

resources.name: AKS node pool - VM Standard_D4as_v5 SPOT (sandbox pool)
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Spot meter D4as v5 Spot; 4 nodes x 730h

resources.name: Azure Container Apps - Workload Profiles environment (consumption)
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; vCPU Active Usage=0.000024/sec and Memory Active Usage=0.000003/GiB-sec; usage: 400 vCPU-hours + 800 GiB-hours

resources.name: Azure Container Registry - Premium
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; meter Premium Registry Unit=1.6666/day converted using 730h

resources.name: Service Bus - Premium tier
resources.notes: Revised round 1 from Standard to Premium per challenger pass-2 finding (Standard does not support Private Endpoint / VNet integration). 1 Premium Messaging Unit at $0.9275/hour x 730 hours; no separate Premium operations meter; geo-DR transfer meters excluded.

resources.name: Cosmos DB for NoSQL - Serverless + PITR
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; 1M RUs=0.305 (50M RU), Data Stored=0.25/GB-month (20GB), PITR Continuous Backup=0.2/GB (20GB)

resources.name: Storage Account - Standard_ZRS Hot/Cool + transactions
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; ZRS Data Stored approximated for 150GB at 0.03/GB-month + operations 0.00036 per 10K for 20M tx

resources.name: Key Vault - Standard
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Operations meter 0.03 per 10K; usage 5M operations/mo

resources.name: Azure Front Door - Premium profile + WAF Premium policy + egress
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Premium Base Fees=330/month (Zone 1) + Premium Data Transfer Out first tier=0.0825/GB for 500GB. No separate WAF policy meter was returned by pricing_get on this endpoint; assumed covered by Premium base fee for this estimate.

resources.name: Log Analytics Workspace - PAYG Analytics
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Standard Data Analyzed=2.3/GB; usage 50GB ingestion/mo

resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Standard vCore vCore Pack, 10 vCPUs x 730h

resources.name: Microsoft Defender for Key Vault
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Per node Std Node at 730h

resources.name: Microsoft Defender for Storage
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Standard Transactions=0.1492 per 1M. Assumed 20M transactions/mo aligned to stated storage workload.

resources.name: Private Endpoint - 6 endpoints + data processed
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Standard Private Endpoint=0.01/hour (Global) + Standard Data Processed ingress=0.01/GB for 50GB

resources.name: Private DNS Zone - 6 zones
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Private Zone=0.5 per zone-month used for first-tier estimate

resources.name: NAT Gateway - 1 gateway + data processed
resources.notes: pricing_get fallback; Standard Gateway=0.045/hour + Standard Data Processed=0.045/GB for 200GB

resources.name: Virtual Network - baseline
resources.notes: static_fallback: VNet base has no recurring charge

optimization_notes: Tooling substitution: azure_bulk_estimate and azure_price_search were not exposed by this MCP endpoint; pricing_get was used per line to complete the estimate.
RI/Savings Plan applicability is strongest for steady VM-backed AKS pools (Standard_D2as_v5).
Front Door WAF policy did not return a standalone meter in pricing_get for this query surface; estimate assumes Premium base fee coverage.
Round 1 revision (2026-05-12): Service Bus changed from Standard ($12.31/mo) to Premium ($677.08/mo) to satisfy Private Endpoint / VNet-integration requirement.
savings_reason: 1-year and 3-year savings quantified for VM-backed AKS node pools using returned savingsPlan rates on Standard_D2as_v5.
eligible_strategies: Reserved Instances / Savings Plan for AKS VM node pools
Spot usage expansion for non-critical AKS workloads
Log volume tuning in Log Analytics
